methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your Lusha API key — found in Profile → API Access. Quickest way to connect with no OAuth setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with a Lusha API Key

Lusha provides a personal API key tied to your account. You can find it in a few clicks.

### Steps

1. Log in to your Lusha account at [app.lusha.com](https://app.lusha.com).
2. Click your avatar or name in the top-right corner to open your profile menu.
3. Select **Profile** from the dropdown.
4. Scroll down to the **API Access** section (or navigate directly to the API tab).
5. Copy the API key shown there.
6. Paste it into the **API Key** field below and click **Submit**.

### Notes

- Your API key is tied to your Lusha seat and quota — each call counts against your plan's enrichment credits.
- If you rotate or regenerate the key in Lusha, update it here to avoid authentication errors.
- Team admins can find API keys for managed seats under **Admin → API** in the Lusha dashboard.
- Keep the key private; anyone with it can consume your enrichment credits.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
